sentences.arabic: تُعْتَبَرُ الضِّيَافَةُ جُزْءًا أَسَاسِيًّا مِنَ الثَّقَافَةِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Gostoprimstvo se smatra osnovnim dijelom arapske kulture.
sentences.translationEn: Hospitality is considered an essential part of Arab culture.

sentences.arabic: يَسْتَقْبِلُ النَّاسُ ضُيُوفَهُمْ بِحَفَاوَةٍ كَبِيرَةٍ فِي بُيُوتِهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi s velikom srdačnošću dočekuju goste u svojim domovima.
sentences.translationEn: People welcome their guests with great warmth in their homes.

sentences.arabic: يُقَدِّمُ الْمُضِيفُ الْقَهْوَةَ الْعَرَبِيَّةَ وَالتَّمْرَ لِلزُّوَّارِ عِنْدَ وُصُولِهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Domaćin nudi arapsku kafu i hurme posjetiocima po njihovom dolasku.
sentences.translationEn: The host offers Arabic coffee and dates to the visitors upon their arrival.

sentences.arabic: يَتَحَدَّثُ الْجَمِيعُ عَنْ مَوَاضِيعَ مُخْتَلِفَةٍ بِكُلِّ مَوَدَّةٍ.
sentences.translation: Svi razgovaraju o različitim temama s puno ljubavi.
sentences.translationEn: Everyone talks about various topics with all affection.

sentences.arabic: يَشْعُرُ الضَّيْفُ دَائِمًا أَنَّهُ فَرْدٌ مِنَ الْعَائِلَةِ.
sentences.translation: Gost se uvijek osjeća kao član porodice.
sentences.translationEn: The guest always feels like a member of the family.
